items.name: Chirashi Bowl
items.notes: 8 kinds of assorted sashimi w/ seasoned rice; served w/ soup and salad

items.name: 3 Sushi / 4 Sashimi + 1 Regular Roll
items.notes: sushi: tuna, salmon, yellowtail; sashimi: 2 tuna, 2 salmon; plus 1 regular roll from choices list; served w/ soup and salad

items.name: 6 Sushi + 1 Regular Roll
items.notes: 6 sushi: tuna, salmon, yellowtail, albacore, seared tuna, shrimp; plus 1 regular roll from choices list; served w/ soup and salad

items.name: 2 Regular Roll Special
items.notes: choose any 2 regular rolls: california, tuna, spicy tuna, shrimp tempura, salmon, spicy salmon, spicy shrimp, spicy crab, vegetable, avocado, cucumber; served w/ soup and salad

items.name: Choose 2 Items
items.notes: pick any 2 of L1 to L15; served w/ rice, soup and salad; some choices carry an add $1 or add $2 surcharge
